title: stachys ajugoides
intro: Stachys ajugoides, also known as Wood Betony or Blue Betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation, which are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Stachys ajugoides include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its possible role in reducing fever and relieving headaches. In herbal preparations, Wood Betony is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness for these uses.
